commands.purpose: List identities matching the filters. Every row is REDACTED (email fingerprint, no dob, no credentials). Use --email=<pattern> with a fingerprint prefix to look up a specific row.
Print the full detail (redacted by default). --reveal-pii unmutes email + dob for the current invocation and writes an audit-log entry keyed to the operator. Never reveals regulated_secret fields.

Clear `locked_until` + reset `failed_attempts_count`. Fires IdentityUnlocked(trigger=admin_action). --reason is written to the audit log; required in production (config('identity.commands.require_reason')).
usage_examples: php artisan identity:unlock idn_01H... --reason='Support ticket #12345, verified user identity'

commands.purpose: Invalidate the current password (sets a random unusable hash), revokes every active session for the referencing Users, issues a fresh PasswordResetToken (15min TTL), sends the reset email unless --no-email. Fires PasswordChanged(trigger=admin_reset).
usage_examples: php artisan identity:force-password-reset idn_01H... --reason='Compromised credentials in customer report'

commands.purpose: Compliance-driven erasure (GDPR Art. 17). Soft-deletes the Identity, refuses if any inbound User / PlatformUser is not also queued for erasure. Actual hard delete is automated via PurgeSoftDeletedIdentitiesJob after the hold period elapses. --confirm required in production; --reason is mandatory + written to the compliance audit log.
usage_examples: php artisan identity:erase idn_01H... --reason='DSAR-2026-00042 GDPR erasure request' --confirm

commands.purpose: Re-encrypt Identity.mfa_secret_encrypted with the current KMS data key. Used during KMS key-rotation events (annual + on suspected compromise). The TOTP secret plaintext is NEVER exposed — the operation decrypts under the previous key inside a hardware-isolated enclave and re-encrypts under the current key. Fires no domain event (this is a cryptographic maintenance operation).
usage_examples: php artisan identity:rotate-mfa-secret idn_01H... --reason='Scheduled annual KMS key rotation'

commands.purpose: Run PurgeExpiredResetTokensJob synchronously. --dry-run reports counts without deleting. Useful for offline environments where the scheduler isn't running.
